title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 161.910 - Bylaws to be adopted by council, no compensation but to be paid expenses
text:
161.910.  Bylaws to be adopted by council, no compensation but to be paid expenses. — 1.  The council shall adopt written bylaws to govern its activities.
  2.  Members shall receive no additional compensation for their service to the council, but shall be reimbursed for reasonable and necessary expenses actually incurred in the performance of official duties.
(L. 1993 H.B. 589 § 2 subsecs. 4, 5, A.L. 2014 H.B. 1299 Revision) 
Transferred 2014; formerly 191.855
